name: German French Toast
recipeIngredient: 2 large Tart apples, peeled, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Whisk together milk, egg yolks, and lemon rind in a bowl.
3. Dip bread slices into the egg mixture until fully saturated.
4. In another bowl, whisk egg whites until frothy.
5. Place soaked bread slices into the beaten egg white mixture, then dredge in bread crumbs.
6. Arrange coated bread on a greased cookie sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
7. Remove from oven, turn over, and return to oven for an additional 10 minutes.
8. While the toast is baking, place apple slices in a small saucepan with water and lemon juice. Bring to a boil and remove from heat.
9. Sauté bratwurst and onions until crispy brown.
10. To serve, sprinkle toast with sugar/cinnamon mixture. Cover with cooked, drained apple slices, sautéed bratwurst, and onions.
11. Serve with maple syrup.
Makes 8 servings.
